briefing.text: The uplink is down. Find the code and get to the terminal.

greet.text: You made it. Thank you — for my family, for all of it. The System forgot this place a long time ago. Out here in the background world, we look out for each other.

codes.text: To move through the background world's dark net, you'll need the green access codes for the uplink terminals. No codes, no passage. Find them.

family.text: I have to find safe passage for my family first. But our paths will cross again — soon. Stay sharp until then.
